result:
All three verifications passed:

1. **`pnpm install`** — exits 0 ✅ (installed 340 packages including remotion 4.0.462)
2. **`pnpm typecheck`** — exits 0 ✅ (no TypeScript errors)
3. **Render** — `out/video.mp4` exists at **476 KB** (well above the 50 KB minimum) ✅

### What was built

- **`Root.tsx`** — Updated `durationInFrames` to `300` (10s × 30fps) and `defaultProps.title` to `'Hello'`
- **`MyVideo.tsx`** — Rewrote the composition:
  - Dark `#0b0f17` background
  - Title "Hello" fades in via `interpolate(frame, [0, 30], [0, 1])` with `extrapolateRight: 'clamp'` so it stays fully visible after frame 30
  - Three `<Sequence>` captions using the existing spring-animated `Caption` component:
    - `"one"` → `from={120}` `durationInFrames={60}`
    - `"two"` → `from={180}` `durationInFrames={60}`
    - `"three"` → `from={240}` `durationInFrames={60}`

EVAL_DONE
